modules.module_title: Introduction to Dance & Performing Arts (Parichay Nritya aur Pradarshan Kala ka)
Pedagogy & Classroom Management (Shikshan Shastra aur Kaksha Prabandhan)
Anatomy & Kinesiology for Dancers (Nartakon ke liye Sharir Rachna Vigyan)
Rhythm, Music & Taal (Lay, Sangeet aur Taal)
Choreography & Performance Skills (Nritya Rachna aur Pradarshan Kaushal)

questions.question: Dance mein 'Abhinaya' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Tez footwork
options.D: Music composition

questions.explanation: 'Abhinaya' ka arth hai chehre ke bhavon aur acting ke zariye kahani ya emotion ko vyakt karna.

questions.question: Inn mein se kaun sa ek Bharatiya 'Shastriya Nritya' (Classical Dance) hai?

options.B: Garba
options.D: Hip Hop

questions.explanation: Kathak Uttar Bharat ka ek pramukh Shastriya Nritya hai, jabki Bhangra aur Garba lok nritya hain.

questions.question: 'Lok Nritya' (Folk Dance) ka aam taur par kya uddeshya hota hai?

options.A: Sirf professional dancers dwara perform karna
options.B: Faslon ki katai, tyohar ya shaadi jaise samudaik avsaron ka jashn manana
options.C: Kathin niyamon aur takneekon ka palan karna
options.D: Keval mandiron mein prastut kiya jaana

questions.explanation: Lok Nritya aksar kisi kshetra ke logon ke dainik jeevan, tyoharon aur reeti-riwajon se juda hota hai aur samuhik roop se jashn manane ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Performing arts ka mukhya uddeshya kya hai?

options.B: Audience ka manoranjan karna, unhe prerit karna ya un tak koi sandesh pahunchana
options.D: Ek doosre se competition karna

questions.explanation: Performing arts, jaise dance, music, aur drama, ka primary goal audience ko entertain karna, unhe emotionally connect karna aur ideas express karna hota hai.

questions.question: Shastriya Nritya (Classical Dance) aur Lok Nritya (Folk Dance) mein mukhya antar kya hai?

options.A: Shastriya Nritya mein kathin niyam aur grammar hote hain, jabki Lok Nritya zyada spontaenous hota hai
options.B: Lok Nritya hamesha akele kiya jaata hai
options.C: Shastriya Nritya mein costume nahi hote
options.D: Lok Nritya sirf shehron mein hota hai

questions.explanation: Classical dance Natya Shastra ke niyamon aur ek strict grammar par adharit hota hai, jabki folk dance kam formal aur community-driven hota hai.

questions.question: Bharatnatyam mool roop se kis Bharatiya rajya ka nritya hai?

options.B: Tamil Nadu
options.D: Odisha

questions.explanation: Bharatnatyam ki utpatti Tamil Nadu ke mandiron se maani jaati hai.

questions.question: Dance ki bhasha mein 'Mudra' kise kehte hain?

options.B: Haathon se banaye gaye gestures ya ishare
options.D: Dance ka costume

questions.explanation: 'Mudra' haathon aur ungliyon se banayi gayi symbolic gestures hoti hain jinka istemal kahani batane ya alag-alag cheezein darshane ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Bhangra kis rajya ka prasiddh lok nritya hai?

options.B: Rajasthan
options.D: Maharashtra

questions.explanation: Bhangra Punjab ka ek urja se bhara lok nritya hai, jo mool roop se fasal katne ke tyohar Vaisakhi par kiya jaata tha.

questions.question: Bharatiya Shastriya Sangeet aur Nritya ka mool granth 'Natya Shastra' kisne likha tha?

options.B: Valmiki
options.D: Bharat Muni

questions.explanation: 'Natya Shastra' ko performing arts par sabse purana aur pramanik granth maana jaata hai, jiske rachayita Bharat Muni hain.

questions.question: Inn mein se kaun sa ek performing art NAHI hai?

options.B: Music
options.D: Theatre

questions.explanation: Painting ek visual art hai, jise darshak dekhte hain. Performing art mein kalakaar audience ke saamne live perform karta hai.

questions.question: 'Nritta', 'Nritya', aur 'Natya' mein kya fark hai?

options.B: Nritta pure dance hai, Nritya mein expressions hote hain, aur Natya drama hai
options.C: Nritta drama hai aur Natya pure dance hai
options.D: Yeh sirf alag-alag bhashaon ke shabd hain

questions.explanation: Nritta taal par adharit pure dance steps hain. Nritya mein dance ke saath bhav (expressions) bhi hote hain. Natya dance ke zariye ki jaane wali acting ya drama hai.

questions.question: Ek dance performance mein costume aur makeup ka kya mahatva hai?

options.B: Yeh character, samay aur jagah ko darshane mein madad karte hain
options.C: Yeh sirf dancer ko sundar dikhane ke liye hote hain
options.D: Yeh audience ka dhyan bhatkate hain

questions.explanation: Costume aur makeup performance ka ek anivarya hissa hain. Yeh character ko sthapit karne, kahani ke mahol ko banane aur audience ko performance se jodne mein madad karte hain.

questions.question: Garba aur Dandiya Raas kis tyohar ke dauran pramukh roop se kiye jaate hain?

options.B: Holi
options.D: Eid

questions.explanation: Garba aur Dandiya Gujarat ke lok nritya hain jo Navratri ke nau dinon ke jashn ke dauran poore utsaah se kiye jaate hain.

questions.question: 'Contemporary Dance' se aap kya samajhte hain?

options.A: Yeh ek purana Shastriya Nritya hai
options.B: Yeh ek modern dance style hai jo alag-alag styles (jaise classical, modern, jazz) se tatva leta hai
options.C: Yeh sirf Bollywood filmon mein hota hai
options.D: Yeh ek tarah ka folk dance hai

questions.explanation: Contemporary dance 20th century mein viksit hua ek expressive dance style hai, jo classical ballet aur modern dance ke elements ko milakar banaya gaya hai.

questions.question: Sabhi dance forms mein kaun sa tatva (element) sabse aavashyak aur common hai?

options.B: Costume
options.D: Props

questions.explanation: Rhythm ya Lay dance ka aadhar hai. Har prakar ke dance mein, chahe woh classical ho ya folk, movement ko ek rhythm mein hi kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Kathakali dance-drama mein, characters ke makeup ke rang kya darshate hain?

options.B: Character ka स्वभाव (jaise hara rang acchai ke liye, laal buraai ke liye)
options.D: Kuch nahi darshate, sirf design hai

questions.explanation: Kathakali mein, makeup ke rang symbolic hote hain. Hara (Pacha) rang shisht aur devtulya characters ke liye, laal (Kathi) rajasik ya burai ke liye, aur kala (Kari) asuron ke liye istemal hota hai.

questions.question: Odissi nritya mool roop se kis rajya se hai?

options.B: Assam
options.D: Andhra Pradesh

questions.explanation: Odissi, jaisa ki naam se spasht hai, Odisha rajya ka ek prachin shastriya nritya hai.

questions.question: Ek 5 saal ke bachhe ko dance step sikhane ka sabse accha tarika kya hai?

options.B: Use daant kar sikhana
options.C: Khel aur kahaniyon ka istemal karke sikhana
options.D: Use professional dancers ke video dikhana

questions.explanation: Chhote bachhe khel-khel mein aur kahaniyon ke madhyam se sabse acchi tarah seekhte hain. Isse unka interest bana rehta hai aur sikhna mazedar ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Ek dance class mein anushasan (discipline) banaye rakhne ke liye instructor ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Class ke liye clear rules banana aur unhe consistently follow karna
options.C: Jo bachhe baat na maane unhe class se bahar nikal dena
options.D: Anushasan par dhyan na dena

questions.explanation: Clear rules aur unka lagatar palan karne se bachhon ko pata hota hai ki unse kya expect kiya jaa raha hai. Yeh ek positive aur structured learning environment banata hai.

questions.question: Agar koi student baar baar ek hi galti kar raha ho, to ek acche instructor ko kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Sabke saamne use daantna
options.C: Use akele mein, patience ke saath alag tarike se samjhana
options.D: Use kehna ki woh dance chhod de

questions.explanation: Har student ka sikhne ka tarika alag hota hai. Patience ke saath, personally aur alag tarike se samjhane se student ko apni galti samajhne aur sudharne mein madad milti hai.

questions.question: Class shuru karne se pehle 'Lesson Plan' banane ka kya fayda hai?

options.A: Iska koi fayda nahi hai, yeh time waste hai
options.B: Yeh class ko ek structure deta hai aur sunishchit karta hai ki sabhi topics cover hon
options.C: Yeh sirf school principal ke liye hota hai
options.D: Yeh student ko confuse karta hai

questions.explanation: Lesson plan instructor ko class ke liye taiyar rehne mein madad karta hai. Isse class ka time aache se manage hota hai aur learning goals achieve hote hain.

questions.question: Students ko feedback dete samay, kis tarah ki bhasha ka prayog karna chahiye?

options.B: Aisi bhasha jise samajhna mushkil ho
options.D: Kisi bhi tarah ki bhasha

questions.explanation: Positive aur constructive feedback student ko motivate karta hai. Unki acchaiyon ko pehle batana aur fir sudhar ke liye sujhav dena, unke confidence ko badhata hai.

questions.question: Dance class mein chhote bachhon ka dhyan banaye rakhne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Class ko lamba aur boring banana
options.B: Unhe daant-te rehna
options.C: Activities ko chhota, mazedar aur engaging rakhna
options.D: Sirf theory padhana

questions.explanation: Chhote bachhon ka attention span kam hota hai. Isliye, activities ko short, fun aur interactive rakhne se unka interest bana rehta hai.

questions.question: Agar class ke dauran ek bachha rone lage, to instructor ki pehli pratikriya kya honi chahiye?

options.B: Use daant kar chup karana
options.C: Shanti se uske rone ka kaaran puchna aur use sahanubhuti dena
options.D: Uske parents ko turant phone karna

questions.explanation: Ek instructor ko empathetic hona chahiye. Bachhe se shanti se baat karke uski samasya ko samajhna aur use comfort feel karana sabse zaroori hai.

questions.question: Dance studio mein aaino (mirrors) ka kya upyog hai?

options.A: Sirf studio ko bada dikhane ke liye
options.B: Dancers ko apni posture, alignment aur movements ko dekhne aur sudharne ke liye
options.C: Yeh dhyan bhatkane ke liye hote hain
options.D: Inka koi khas upyog nahi hai

questions.explanation: Mirrors ek important tool hain jo dancers ko visual feedback dete hain, jisse woh apne form aur technique ko aasaani se correct kar paate hain.

questions.question: Ek 'mixed-ability' group (jahan kuch students beginner hain aur kuch advanced) ko padhane ka sabse prabhavi tarika kya hai?

options.A: Sirf advanced students par dhyan dena
options.B: Sirf beginner students par dhyan dena
options.C: Aise steps aur variations dena jo sabhi levels ke students ke liye adaptable hon
options.D: Aise group ko padhane se mana kar dena

questions.explanation: Ek acche instructor ko choreography ko modify karna aana chahiye, taaki basic steps beginners ke liye hon aur advanced variations unke liye jo zyada challenge chahte hain. Isse sabhi students engaged rehte hain.

questions.question: Student ki progress ko track karne ke liye kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Kuch bhi nahi, bas padhate rehna chahiye
options.B: Samay-samay par unka observation, informal assessment aur unke videos record karna
options.D: Unke parents se unki progress puchna

questions.explanation: Regular observation aur periodic recording se instructor student ki growth, strengths aur weaknesses ko samajh sakta hai aur uske anusaar apni teaching ko adjust kar sakta hai.

questions.question: Ek sharmile (shy) student ko class mein participate karne ke liye kaise protsahit karein?

options.A: Use zabardasti sabke saamne dance karne ko kahein
options.B: Ek surakshit aur supportive mahol banayein aur chhote-chhote safaltaon par uski prashansa karein
options.C: Uski tulna doosre students se karein
options.D: Us par dhyan na dein

questions.explanation: Ek positive aur non-judgmental environment banane se shy students ko khulne mein madad milti hai. Chhoti achievements par bhi encouragement unka confidence build karta hai.

questions.question: Parents ke saath communication kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Sirf fees ke baare mein baat karne ke liye
options.C: Student ki progress, behavior aur kisi bhi concern par charcha karne ke liye, taaki ek strong partnership ban sake
options.D: Sirf bachhe ki shikayat karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Regular parent-teacher communication se trust build hota hai. Yeh student ke overall development ke liye zaroori hai, kyunki isse parents aur instructor dono ek hi page par hote hain.

questions.question: Ek 60-minute ki dance class ka aadarsh structure kya hona chahiye?

options.B: 10 min warm-up, 30 min nayi technique/choreography, 15 min practice, 5 min cool-down
options.D: Shuru mein cool-down aur end mein warm-up

questions.explanation: Ek well-structured class mein warm-up, skill development, practice aur cool-down, sabhi ke liye paryapt samay hona chahiye. Yeh injury se bachata hai aur learning ko maximize karta hai.

questions.question: 'Kinesthetic Learning' ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Dekh kar sikhna
options.C: Sharirik roop se karke (physically doing) sikhna
options.D: Kitaabein padh kar sikhna

questions.explanation: Kinesthetic learning, ya 'learning by doing', dance ke liye sabse important hai. Ismein students movements ko khud perform karke seekhte hain.

questions.question: Class mein 'Positive Reinforcement' ka ek udaharan kya hai?

options.A: Galti karne par student ko daantna
options.B: Jab student koi step sahi kare to uski taarif karna, jaise 'Bahut accha kiya!'
options.D: Har student ko ek jaisa feedback dena

questions.explanation: Positive reinforcement ka matlab hai acche behavior ya performance ko reward karna (jaise prashansa se), taaki student use dohrane ke liye protsahit ho.

questions.question: Ek instructor ko alag-alag learning styles (visual, auditory, kinesthetic) ko apni teaching mein kyu shamil karna chahiye?

options.A: Kyunki yeh syllabus mein likha hai
options.B: Taaki class zyada se zyada students tak prabhavi dhang se pahunch sake
options.D: Taaki class zyada mushkil lage

questions.explanation: Har student alag tarike se seekhta hai. Kuch dekh kar (visual), kuch sun kar (auditory), aur kuch kar ke (kinesthetic). Sabhi styles ko shamil karne se sabhi students ko sikhne mein aasaani hoti hai.

questions.question: Agar ek student doosre students ko pareshan kar raha ho (disruptive behavior), to instructor ko turant kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Poori class ke saamne us par chillaana
options.B: Use ignore kar dena, woh apne aap chup ho jayega
options.C: Shanti se, lekin dridhta se uske behavior ko rokna aur class ke baad usse alag se baat karna
options.D: Class ko turant cancel kar dena

questions.explanation: Disruptive behavior ko turant, lekin shaant aur professional tareeke se handle karna zaroori hai. Isse class ka mahol kharab nahi hota aur student ko apni galti ka ehsaas bhi karaya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Dance class shuru karne se pehle 'Warm-up' karna kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Yeh sharir ko aane wali activity ke liye taiyar karta hai aur chot (injury) ke khatre ko kam karta hai
options.C: Yeh time pass karne ke liye hota hai
options.D: Yeh zaroori nahi hai

questions.explanation: Warm-up muscles mein blood flow badhata hai, unhe flexible banata hai aur heart rate ko dheere-dheere badhata hai, jisse sharir dance ki intense activity ke liye taiyar ho jaata hai.

questions.question: Dance class ke baad 'Cool-down' karne ka kya laabh hai?

options.B: Iska koi laabh nahi hai
options.C: Yeh heart rate ko dheere-dheere normal karta hai aur muscles mein lachilapan badhata hai
options.D: Yeh sirf professional dancers ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Cool-down, jisme stretching shamil hai, sharir ko resting state mein wapas laane mein madad karta hai aur agle din hone wale muscle soreness ko kam karta hai.

questions.question: Dancers ke liye 'Core Strength' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Pairon ki takat
options.C: Pet, peeth aur kamar ke aas-paas ki muscles ki takat, jo balance aur stability ke liye zaroori hai
options.D: Kandhon ki takat

questions.explanation: Ek strong core dancer ko behtar balance, control aur powerful movements karne mein madad karta hai. Yeh spine ko support karta hai aur injury se bachata hai.

questions.question: Dance mein sahi 'Posture' ya 'Mudra' banaye rakhna kyu mahatvapurna hai?

options.B: Isse movements sahi aur surakshit roop se hote hain aur chot ka khatra kam hota hai
options.C: Iska performance se koi lena-dena nahi hai
options.D: Yeh dance ko aur mushkil bana deta hai

questions.explanation: Sahi posture se sharir ka weight aache se distribute hota hai, jisse balance behtar hota hai aur joints aur muscles par anavashyak dabav nahi padta.

questions.question: Dance ke dauran saans (breathing) lene ka sahi tarika kya hai?

options.B: Movements ke saath rhythm mein, gehri aur niyamit saans lena
options.D: Jaise man kare waise saans lena

questions.explanation: Proper breathing muscles ko oxygen pahunchati hai, jisse stamina badhta hai aur thakaan kam hoti hai. Saans ko movement ke saath coordinate karna zaroori hai.

questions.question: Agar dance karte samay ankle mein moch aa jaye, to R.I.C.E. method mein 'C' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Compression (Dabav)
options.D: Cut (Kaatna)

questions.explanation: R.I.C.E. ek first-aid technique hai: Rest (Aaram), Ice (Barf), Compression (Dabav ke liye patti baandhna), aur Elevation (Chot wale hisse ko upar uthana).

questions.question: Ek dancer ke liye paryapt maatra mein paani peena (hydration) kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Isse muscles aache se kaam karte hain, energy level bana rehta hai aur cramps se bachav hota hai
options.C: Sirf pyaas lagne par paani peena chahiye
options.D: Paani peene se performance kharab hoti hai

questions.explanation: Dance ek physical activity hai jisme paseena aata hai. Dehydration se bachne aur performance level maintain karne ke liye paani peena bahut zaroori hai.

questions.question: Dancers mein 'Turnout' (pairon ko bahar ki taraf ghumaana) sharir ke kis joint se hota hai?

options.B: Knees (Ghutno) se
options.D: Kamar se

questions.explanation: Sahi aur surakshit turnout hip joint se aana chahiye. Ghutno ya takhno se zabardasti turnout karne par chot lag sakti hai.

questions.question: Dance mein 'Alignment' shabd ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Sharir ke alag-alag hisson (jaise sir, kandhe, kamar, ghutne) ka ek doosre ke sambandh mein sahi sthiti mein hona
options.D: Stage par sahi jagah khade hona

questions.explanation: Proper alignment se sharir par aane wala stress aache se distribute hota hai, jisse balance behtar hota hai aur chot ka khatra kam hota hai.

questions.question: Dancers ko apni diet mein Carbohydrates (jaise roti, chawal, aalu) kyu shamil karne chahiye?

options.B: Yeh sharir ko energy ka mukhya srot pradan karte hain
options.D: Yeh sirf taste ke liye hote hain

questions.explanation: Carbohydrates sharir ke liye fuel ka kaam karte hain, jo dance jaisi high-intensity activity ke liye zaroori energy pradan karte hain.

questions.question: Stretching karne ka sabse accha samay kab hota hai?

options.A: Thande muscles par, warm-up se pehle
options.B: Warm-up ke baad aur cool-down ke dauran
options.D: Subah uthte hi turant

questions.explanation: Muscles ko warm karne ke baad stretching karna zyada surakshit aur prabhavi hota hai. Thande muscles ko stretch karne se muscle pull ka khatra rehta hai.

questions.question: Dancers mein sabse aam chot (common injury) kaun si hoti hai?

options.B: Ungli ki chot
options.C: Takhne (Ankle) aur ghutne (Knee) ki moch ya tanav
options.D: Pet dard

questions.explanation: Jumping, turning aur footwork ke kaaran, dancers ke lower body joints jaise ankle aur knee par sabse zyada dabav padta hai, isliye yahan chot lagne ki sambhavna adhik hoti hai.

questions.question: 'Muscle Memory' kya hai?

options.A: Muscles ki yaad karne ki shakti
options.B: Ek movement ko itni baar repeat karna ki woh bina soche samjhe, automatically hone lage
options.C: Ek muscle ka naam yaad rakhna
options.D: Yeh ek kalpanik cheez hai

questions.explanation: Jab hum ek movement ko baar-baar practice karte hain, to hamara brain uske liye ek pathway bana leta hai. Isse woh movement smooth, efficient aur automatic ho jaati hai. Ise hi muscle memory kehte hain.

questions.question: Overtraining ya zaroorat se zyada practice karne ke kya lakshan ho sakte hain?

options.B: Lagatar thakaan, neend na aana, performance mein giravat aur chot lagne ka khatra badhna
options.D: Weight tezi se badhna

questions.explanation: Sharir ko aaram aur recovery ka samay dena utna hi zaroori hai jitna practice karna. Overtraining se sharir aur dimaag dono par negative asar padta hai.

questions.question: Lachilapan (Flexibility) badhane ke liye kis tarah ki activity sabse upyukt hai?

options.B: Running
options.D: Jumping

questions.explanation: Stretching exercises muscles aur connective tissues ko lamba karti hain, jisse joints ki range of motion badhti hai aur sharir mein lachilapan aata hai.

questions.question: Ek dancer ko paryapt neend lena kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Yeh zaroori nahi hai, kam sone se zyada practice ka time milta hai
options.B: Neend ke dauran hi sharir muscles ko repair karta hai aur recover hota hai
options.D: Neend sirf dimaag ke liye hai, sharir ke liye nahi

questions.explanation: Paryapt neend physical aur mental recovery ke liye anivarya hai. Isse agle din ki performance, concentration aur energy level behtar hota hai.

questions.question: Sahi dance shoes pehenna kyu mahatvapurna hai?

options.B: Yeh pairo ko support dete hain, shock absorb karte hain aur chot se bachate hain
options.C: Koi bhi joote pehenkar dance kiya ja sakta hai
options.D: Joote performance ko kharab karte hain

questions.explanation: Alag-alag dance styles ke liye specific shoes design kiye jaate hain jo zaroori support, flexibility aur protection pradan karte hain.

questions.question: Sangeet mein 'Taal' kise kehte hain?

options.B: Music ki speed
options.D: Music ki awaaz

questions.explanation: Taal music mein samay ko maapne ka ek zariya hai. Yeh matraon ya beats ka ek repetitive cycle hota hai, jaise Teen Taal 16 matraon ka cycle hai.

questions.question: Sabse prachalit Taalon mein se ek, 'Teen Taal' mein kitni matraayein (beats) hoti hain?
questions.explanation: Teen Taal mein 16 matraayein hoti hain, jo 4-4 matraon ke 4 vibhagon (divisions) mein banti hoti hain.

questions.question: Sangeet mein 'Laya' ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Gaane ki awaaz (volume)
options.D: Gaane ke shabd (lyrics)

questions.explanation: Laya music ki speed ya tempo ko kehte hain. Yeh teen prakar ki hoti hai: Vilambit (dheemi), Madhya (medium), aur Drut (tez).

questions.question: Taal ke chakr (cycle) ki pehli matra ko kya kehte hain?

options.B: Taali
options.D: Vibhag

questions.explanation: 'Sam' Taal cycle ki pehli aur sabse important matra hoti hai. Aksar dance ya music ki mukhya movements 'Sam' par aakar milti hain.

questions.question: Drut Laya aur Vilambit Laya mein kya antar hai?

options.B: Drut Laya tez hoti hai aur Vilambit Laya dheemi hoti hai
options.C: Drut Laya dheemi hoti hai aur Vilambit Laya tez hoti hai
options.D: Inka laya se koi sambandh nahi hai

questions.explanation: Drut ka arth hai 'tez' aur Vilambit ka arth hai 'dheema'. Yeh music ke tempo ko batane wale shabd hain.

questions.question: Shastriya sangeet mein Taal ko aam taur par kis vaadyayantra (instrument) par bajaya jaata hai?

options.B: Sitar
options.D: Flute

questions.explanation: Tabla aur Pakhawaj pramukh taal-vaadya (percussion instruments) hain jinka upyog Shastriya sangeet aur nritya mein rhythm banaye rakhne ke liye kiya jaata hai.

questions.question: Beginners ko rhythm sikhane ke liye sabse aasan tarika kya hai?

options.B: Taali bajakar (clapping) ya '1-2-3-4' bolkar count karna
options.D: Unhe theory padhana

questions.explanation: Clapping ya counting jaisi physical activities se beginners ko beat ko feel karne aur use internalize karne mein madad milti hai.

questions.question: 'Keherwa Taal' mein kitni matraayein hoti hain?
questions.explanation: Keherwa ek lokpriya Taal hai jisme 8 matraayein hoti hain, jo 4-4 ke do vibhagon mein banti hoti hain.

questions.question: Ek dancer ke liye sangeet ko samajhna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Yeh zaroori nahi hai, dancer ko sirf steps karne hote hain
options.B: Taaki woh music ke bhav, rhythm aur structure ke anusaar apne movements aur expressions ko dhal sake
options.D: Isse dancer confuse ho jaata hai

questions.explanation: Dance aur music ka gehra rishta hai. Music ko samajhne se dancer apni performance ko aur zyada meaningful aur impactful bana sakta hai.

questions.question: Sangeet mein 'Tihai' kya hota hai?

options.B: Ek hi bol ya phrase ko teen baar dohrana jo 'Sam' par aakar samapt ho
options.D: Ek vaadyayantra

questions.explanation: Tihai ek rhythmic pattern hai jisme kisi phrase ko teen baar repeat kiya jaata hai aur iska ant hamesha 'Sam' (pehli matra) par hota hai, jisse ek conclusion ka ehsaas hota hai.

questions.question: 'Dadra Taal' mein kitni matraayein hoti hain?
questions.explanation: Dadra Taal mein 6 matraayein hoti hain, jo 3-3 ke do vibhagon mein banti hoti hain.

questions.question: Taal mein 'Khali' ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Taal ka vo sthan jahan taali nahi bajayi jaati, balki haath se ishara kiya jaata hai
options.D: Do taalon ke beech ka gap

questions.explanation: Khali, jise 'un-stressed beat' bhi kehte hain, Taal cycle mein ek aisa point hota hai jo vibhag ko darshata hai lekin us par taali nahi bajayi jaati. Yeh 'Sam' ke apeksha kam important hota hai.

questions.question: Kisi gaane mein 'beat' ya 'matra' ko pehchanne ka sabse aasan tarika kya hai?

options.B: Gaane ke rhythm ke saath pair tap-tapana ya chhutki bajana
options.D: Gaane ke instrument ko pehchanna

questions.explanation: Beat music ka regular pulse hota hai. Uske saath physically interact karne (jaise tapping ya clapping) se use pehchanne mein aasaani hoti hai.

questions.question: Tabla ya Dholak ke 'Bol' kya hote hain?

options.B: Tabla par bajaye jaane wale alag-alag strokes ke naam (jaise Dha, Dhin, Na, Tin)
options.D: Tabla ki company ka naam

questions.explanation: 'Bol' percussion instruments par bajaye jaane wale alag-alag sounds ke naam hain. Inhi bols ko milakar alag-alag Taal aur patterns banaye jaate hain.

questions.question: Western music mein 'Time Signature' jaise 4/4 ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.A: Gaana 4 minute aur 4 second ka hai
options.B: Gaane mein 4 instrument hain
options.C: Har measure (bar) mein 4 beats hain, aur har beat ek quarter note ke barabar hai
options.D: Yeh gaane ka tempo batata hai

questions.explanation: Time signature batata hai ki music ke har measure mein kitni beats hain (upar ka number) aur kaun sa note value ek beat ke barabar hai (neeche ka number). 4/4 common time kehlata hai.

questions.question: Ek dancer ko rhythm sense sudharne ke liye kaun si practice karni chahiye?

options.B: Alag-alag tempo ke music ko sunna aur uspar count karne ki practice karna
options.D: Rhythm par dhyan na dena

questions.explanation: Actively music sunna aur uski beats ko count karna, chahe woh dheema ho ya tez, rhythmic sense ko develop karne ka sabse accha tarika hai.

questions.question: Agar music 8-count par set hai, to iska matlab kya hai?

options.B: Dance movements ko 8 beats ke phrases mein gina jaa raha hai
options.C: Gaane mein 8 shabdon ka istemal hua hai
options.D: Sirf 8 log dance kar sakte hain

questions.explanation: Modern dance forms mein, choreography ko aasaani se sikhane ke liye music ko aksar 8 beats ke sections mein toda jaata hai, jise '8-count' kehte hain.

questions.question: 'Choreography' ka kya arth hai?

options.B: Dance ke liye steps aur movements ko design aur arrange karna
options.D: Costume banana

questions.explanation: Choreography dance rachna ki kala hai, jisme ek choreographer music, theme aur dancers ke anusaar movements ki ek shrinkhala (sequence) taiyar karta hai.

questions.question: Stage par 'Stage Presence' ka kya matlab hota hai?

options.B: Dancer ka aatmavishwas (confidence), energy aur audience se connect karne ki kshamta
options.D: Stage ke peeche rehna

questions.explanation: Stage presence woh quality hai jo ek performer ko audience ke liye aakarshak aur engaging banati hai, bhale hi woh koi difficult step na kar raha ho.

questions.question: Ek group dance mein 'Formations' ka kya upyog hai?

options.A: Dancers ko aaram karne ke liye
options.B: Performance ko visually interesting banane ke liye aur sabhi dancers ko dikhane ke liye
options.D: Audience ko confuse karne ke liye

questions.explanation: Formations (jaise line, circle, V-shape) ke zariye stage par patterns banaye jaate hain, jisse group choreography sundar aur dynamic lagti hai.

questions.question: Performance ke dauran audience se aankh milana (eye contact) kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Yeh zaroori nahi hai, neeche dekh kar dance karna chahiye
options.B: Yeh audience ko darane ke liye hai
options.C: Yeh audience ke saath ek connection banata hai aur unhe performance mein shamil karta hai
options.D: Isse dancer ka dhyan bhatakta hai

questions.explanation: Eye contact se confidence jhalakta hai aur audience ko lagta hai ki performer unse seedhe communicate kar raha hai, jisse performance aur prabhavi ho jaati hai.

questions.question: Dance mein 'Improvisation' kise kehte hain?

options.A: Pehle se taiyar ki gayi choreography ko perform karna
options.B: Bina kisi taiyari ke, usi samay (spontaneously) movements create karna
options.D: Dance karne se mana kar dena

questions.explanation: Improvisation ek creative process hai jisme dancer music ya theme ke aadhar par anayasa hi movements banata hai. Yeh creativity badhane ki ek acchi exercise hai.

questions.question: Ek acchi choreography mein kya gun hone chahiye?

options.A: Woh bahut zyada lambi honi chahiye
options.B: Usme ek shuruat, madhya aur ant (beginning, middle, end) hona chahiye aur woh music se mel khani chahiye
options.C: Usme sirf mushkil steps hone chahiye
options.D: Woh music se bilkul alag honi chahiye

questions.explanation: Ek prabhavi choreography ek kahani ki tarah hoti hai. Uska ek clear structure hota hai, woh audience ka interest banaye rakhti hai aur music ke mood ko complement karti hai.

questions.question: Stage par lighting ka performance par kya prabhav padta hai?

options.B: Yeh mood set karti hai, dancer par focus karti hai aur performance ke mahol ko badhati hai
options.C: Yeh sirf roshni ke liye hoti hai
options.D: Yeh audience ka dhyan bhatkati hai

questions.explanation: Lighting ek powerful tool hai. Alag-alag rangon aur intensity ki lights se khushi, dukh ya suspense jaisa mahol banaya ja sakta hai.

questions.question: Stage par jaane se pehle ghabrahat (stage fright) ko kam karne ka ek tarika kya hai?

options.A: Performance ke baare mein na sochna
options.B: Gehri saans lene ki exercise karna aur positive visualization karna
options.D: Audience ke baare mein bura sochna

questions.explanation: Deep breathing se nervous system shaant hota hai aur apni safal performance ki kalpana karne se confidence badhta hai.

questions.question: Choreography mein 'Transitions' ka kya kaam hai?

options.B: Ek step ya formation se doosre tak smoothly aur seamlessly jaana
options.D: Yeh choreography ka hissa nahi hain

questions.explanation: Acche transitions choreography ko jhatke daar (jerky) lagne se bachate hain aur poori performance ko ek flow mein rakhte hain.

questions.question: Ek dance piece choreograph karne ke liye music ka chunav karte samay kya dhyan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Sirf sabse naya gaana chunna chahiye
options.B: Music ka tempo, mood aur theme dance ke concept se mel khana chahiye
options.C: Aisa music chunna chahiye jise kisi ne na suna ho
options.D: Music ke copyrights par dhyan nahi dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Sahi music choreography ka aadhar hota hai. Music ko dance ke emotion aur kahani ko support karna chahiye.

questions.question: Ek performance ke liye 'Blocking' ya 'Spacing' ka kya matlab hai?

options.B: Stage par dancers ki positions aur movements ko plan karna
options.D: Stage par jagah kam karna

questions.explanation: Blocking yeh sunishchit karta hai ki har dancer ko pata ho ki use stage par kab aur kahan hona hai, jisse takkar na ho aur formations saaf dikhein.

questions.question: Facial expressions (Bhaav) ek dance performance mein kyu zaroori hain?

options.B: Yeh dance ke emotion aur kahani ko audience tak pahunchate hain
options.C: Yeh dancer ko thaka dete hain
options.D: Yeh sirf classical dance mein zaroori hain

questions.explanation: Bina expressions ke dance sirf ek physical exercise jaisa lag sakta hai. Bhaav hi performance mein jaan daalte hain aur use arthpurna banate hain.

questions.question: Beginners ke liye choreography banate samay, ek instructor ko kya dhyaan rakhna chahiye?

options.A: Choreography bahut mushkil aur tez honi chahiye
options.B: Steps simple, repetitive aur unki shamta ke anusaar hone chahiye
options.C: Choreography 10 minute se lambi honi chahiye
options.D: Unhe professional level ki choreography deni chahiye

questions.explanation: Beginners ke liye aisi choreography honi chahiye jise woh aasaani se seekh sakein aur perform kar sakein. Isse unka confidence badhta hai aur dance mein interest bana rehta hai.

questions.question: Performance se pehle 'Technical Rehearsal' ka kya uddeshya hota hai?

options.B: Stage par lights, sound aur anya technical elements ke saath dance ki practice karna
options.D: Yeh rehearsal ka aakhri din hota hai

questions.explanation: Technical rehearsal yeh sunishchit karne ke liye hoti hai ki show ke din lights, music cues, props, aur sabhi technical cheezein aache se kaam kar rahi hain.

questions.question: Dance ke zariye kahani sunane (storytelling) ke liye sabse important tatva kya hai?

options.B: Abhinaya (expressions), Mudras (gestures) aur sharirik bhasha (body language) ka sahi istemal
options.D: Sirf ek jagah khade rehna

questions.explanation: Ek safal dance-storytelling mein movements, gestures aur expressions milkar ek kahani bunte hain jise audience aasaani se samajh aur mehsoos kar sakti hai.

questions.question: Final performance se pehle 'Full Dress Rehearsal' kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Taaki dancers ko costume, makeup aur props ke saath perform karne ki aadat ho jaye
options.D: Taaki costume ganda ho jaye

questions.explanation: Dress rehearsal show ka ek poora run-through hota hai. Isse dancers ko costume mein move karne mein aane wali pareshaniyon ka pata chalta hai aur woh final performance ke liye poori tarah taiyar ho jaate hain.

questions.question: Ek dance instructor ke liye class mein kis tarah ke kapde (attire) pehenna aadarsh hai?

options.B: Aaramdayak (comfortable) kapde jisme movements aasaani se ho sakein aur dikh sakein
options.D: Formal suit

questions.explanation: Instructor ko aise kapde pehenne chahiye jo unhe aasaani se move karne dein aur jisme unki body lines students ko saaf dikhein, taaki students unhe aache se copy kar sakein.

questions.question: Ek professional instructor ke liye samay ka paaband (punctual) hona kyu zaroori hai?

options.B: Yeh students ke liye ek accha udaharan set karta hai aur unke samay ka samman karta hai
options.C: Sirf tab zaroori hai jab principal dekh rahe hon
options.D: Der se aane se instructor important lagta hai

questions.explanation: Punctuality professionalism aur respect ka prateek hai. Samay par class shuru karne se poora lesson plan aache se follow ho pata hai.

questions.question: Dance studio mein ek surakshit (safe) mahol banane ke liye sabse pehle kya check karna chahiye?

options.B: Dance floor saaf, samtal (even) aur fisalne wala na ho
options.D: AC ka temperature

questions.explanation: Ek unsafe floor (geela, toota hua ya asamtal) chot lagne ka sabse bada kaaran ho sakta hai. Isliye floor ki safety sunishchit karna pehli prathmikta hai.

questions.question: Agar class ke dauran ek student ko chot lag jaye, to instructor ko sabse pehle kya karna chahiye?

options.B: Chot ko ignore karna
options.C: Shaant rehkar, turant First Aid dena aur zaroorat padne par uske parents ko soochit karna
options.D: Class jaari rakhna

questions.explanation: Instructor ki zimmedari hai ki woh basic first aid jaane aur kisi bhi emergency mein shaanti se aur sahi tareeke se pratikriya de.

questions.question: Students ki personal jaankari (jaise phone number, address) ke saath instructor ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Use sabke saath share karna chahiye
options.B: Use social media par post karna chahiye
options.C: Use gopniya (confidential) rakhna chahiye aur sirf emergency mein istemal karna chahiye
options.D: Use delete kar dena chahiye

questions.explanation: Student ki privacy ka samman karna ek professional instructor ka kartavya hai. Personal details ko surakshit aur gopniya rakhna chahiye.

questions.question: Parents ke saath unke bachhe ki progress ke baare mein baat karne ka sabse accha tarika kya hai?

options.B: Doosre bachhon se uski tulna karna
options.C: Pehle uski acchaiyan batana, fir jahan sudhar ki gunjaish hai, woh pyaar se batana
options.D: Parents se baat hi na karna

questions.explanation: Ek balanced aur constructive feedback dene se parents positive rehte hain aur woh instructor ke saath milkar bachhe ki behtari ke liye kaam karne ko taiyar hote hain.

questions.question: Ek instructor ke taur par, lagatar apni skills ko update karte rehna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Yeh zaroori nahi hai, ek baar seekh liya to kaafi hai
options.B: Taaki students ko hamesha naya aur behtar sikhne ko mile aur instructor industry trends ke saath update rahe
options.C: Sirf certificate jama karne ke liye
options.D: Taaki fees badha sakein

questions.explanation: Performing arts ek dynamic field hai. Nayi techniques, styles aur teaching methods seekhte rehne se instructor ki value badhti hai aur students ko high-quality education milti hai.

questions.question: Agar koi parent aapse aapke teaching method par narazgi jataye, to aapko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Unse behas karna shuru kar dena
options.B: Unki baat ko ignore kar dena
options.C: Shaanti se unki poori baat sunna, unke nazariye ko samajhne ki koshish karna aur fir professional tareeke se apna paksh rakhna
options.D: Us bachhe ko class se nikal dena

questions.explanation: Ek professional ko complaints ko calmly aur respectfully handle karna aana chahiye. Sunna aur samvad karna samasya ko suljhane ka sabse accha tarika hai.

questions.question: Dance class ke liye fees aur payment policies ke baare mein kya karna sabse aacha hai?

options.B: Koi policy na banana
options.C: Shuru mein hi sabhi parents ko policies (jaise fees kab deni hai, late fees, refund policy) clear likhit mein batana
options.D: Har parent se alag-alag fees lena

questions.explanation: Clear aur consistent policies rakhne se baad mein hone wale confusion aur vivad se bacha ja sakta hai. Yeh professionalism ko darshata hai.

questions.question: Ek dance instructor ke professional ethics (vyavsayik naitikta) mein kya shamil hai?

options.A: Apne pasandida students ko zyada dhyan dena
options.B: Sabhi students ke saath nishpaksh (fair) aur sammanpurn (respectful) vyavhar karna
options.D: Students se unki personal life ke baare mein puchna

questions.explanation: Professional ethics ka matlab hai sabhi students ko barabar avsar dena, unki privacy ka samman karna, aur ek positive aur surakshit sikhne ka mahol banaye rakhna.

questions.question: Class mein hamesha ek First-Aid kit rakhna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Yeh ek formal-liti hai, iski zaroorat nahi padti
options.B: Chhoti-moti choton (jaise katna, chhilna) ka turant upchar karne ke liye
options.C: Sirf inspection ke time dikhane ke liye
options.D: Yeh studio ko professional look deta hai

questions.explanation: Physical activity wali jagah par First-Aid kit anivarya hai taaki kisi bhi minor injury ko turant sambhala ja sake aur infection se bachaya ja sake.

questions.question: Ek dance instructor ke roop mein apni reputation (pratishtha) kaise banayein?

options.A: Apni marketing par bahut paisa kharch karke
options.B: Doosre schools se students ko tod kar
options.C: Consistent, high-quality teaching, professionalism aur students ke saath positive rishta banakar
options.D: Sirf advanced students ko padha kar

questions.explanation: Sabse acchi reputation 'word-of-mouth' se banti hai, jo tabhi hota hai jab aapki teaching quality acchi ho aur students aur parents aapse khush hon.

questions.question: Liability Insurance ek dance studio ke liye kyu mahatvapurna ho sakti hai?

options.A: Yeh studio ke मुनाफे ko badhati hai
options.B: Yeh studio mein chot lagne ki sthiti mein hone wale kaanooni aur vitteey jokhimon se bachav karti hai
options.D: Yeh sirf bade studios ke liye hai

questions.explanation: Liability insurance ek suraksha kavach hai. Agar koi student studio mein ghayal ho jaata hai aur case karta hai, to insurance medical aur legal kharchon ko cover karne mein madad karti hai.

questions.question: Agar aap dekhein ki ek student theek se warm-up nahi kar raha hai, to aap kya karenge?

options.B: Use class se nikal denge
options.C: Use rokenge aur use samjhayenge ki chot se bachne ke liye sahi warm-up kitna zaroori hai
options.D: Sabke saamne uska mazak udayenge

questions.explanation: Instructor ki yeh zimmedari hai ki woh students ko surakshit practices ke baare mein shikshit kare. Warm-up ko aache se karwana unki safety ke liye anivarya hai.

questions.question: Apne students ke liye ek role model banne ke liye, ek instructor ko kya karna chahiye?

options.A: Yeh dikhana ki woh kabhi galti nahi karte
options.B: Anushasan, kathin parishram, positive attitude aur dance ke prati junoon ka pradarshan karna
options.C: Sirf apni uplabdhiyon ke baare mein baat karna
options.D: Students ke saath doston jaisa vyavhar karna

questions.explanation: Instructor ke actions unke shabdon se zyada prabhav daalte hain. Ek positive aur disciplined role model students ko na sirf dance mein balki jeevan mein bhi prerit karta hai.

questions.question: Har student ka emergency contact number apne paas rakhna kyu zaroori hai?

options.A: Unhe marketing messages bhejne ke liye
options.B: Kisi bhi medical emergency ya anapekshit sthiti mein unke parivaar se turant sampark karne ke liye
options.D: Sirf record ke liye

questions.explanation: Student ki suraksha sarvopari hai. Kisi bhi aapat sthiti mein, unke parijanon tak turant pahunchna atyant mahatvapurna hai.
